MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jonathan Nightingale for administrator Anthony D. Bailey (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Status on Close of Estate.

Mr. Nightingale reported that a final petition was drafted and that the administrator will be signing it today. He requested a short continuance to allow time to have the petition signed and later filed.

The Court continued the matter to December 22, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-22-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Anthony Bailey (petitioner) in propria persona.
Latoya Cunningham (decedent's granddaughter) in propria persona.
Ijeoma Ogbuagu (decedent's grandson) in propria persona.

Ms. Cunningham stated that she received something from Anthony in the mail, that her objection is that she doesn't feel what the will does is fair, that she wants to object and that she wants to file a petition to be appointed as she wants to be the administrator as well. The court noted that the objection was not verified under penalty of perjury and stated that in the objection there are no legal grounds for not admitting the will. Mr. Bailey stated that what Ms. Cunningham is asking was not his grandmother's intent at the time of her passing, that he does not want to sell the house, that he would like to carry out his grandmother's wishes and continue her legacy, and take care of the house, make repairs and live there. Mr. Bailey also stated that he thinks the will should be admitted today. Further discussion was held regarding the family dynamics/relationships. The Court granted the Second Amended Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed over the objections. The will dated July 25, 2022 is admitted to probate. Anthony D. Bailey is appointed as the Administrator of the estate with will annexed with full authority. Bond is set at $965,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on filing of the inventory and appraisal is set for October 21, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for June 23, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Frank Mahoney, III is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Tan. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-13-2024 Continued To May-22-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Anthony Bailey (petitioner) in propria persona.
Latoya Cunningham (granddaughter) in propria persona.
Ijeoma Ogbuagu (grandson) in propria persona.

Mrs. Cunningham and Mr. Ogbuagu presented oral objections. The 2nd Amended Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters of Administration is continued to May 22, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for the parties to file written objections.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
